northreach.sector: strategic-minerals, sensor manufacturing, and cold-chain services
northreach.arrival: temporary heating allocation, a recognized address, and a verified winter transport route
northreach.risk: heating costs, weather delays, and concentrated energy supply
northreach.market_opportunity: precision sensing and mineral verification services
northreach.dependency: superconductive filament arriving through the northern freight corridor
northreach.substitute: cryogenic ceramic and conventional sensor-board production
northreach.community: audit an emergency warming center’s supply list and transport access

yrethia.sector: maritime logistics, customs services, and trade finance
yrethia.arrival: your address record, temporary berth district housing, and corrected work documentation
yrethia.risk: port congestion, customs holds, and uninsured route changes
yrethia.market_opportunity: cargo telemetry and compliant rerouting services
yrethia.dependency: marine seal assemblies moving through a congested customs lane
yrethia.substitute: protective packaging and alternate inland transshipment
yrethia.community: review a dockside cooperative’s shipment records and damage-prevention process

thaloris.sector: repair, salvage processing, and re-export trade
thaloris.arrival: legal lodging, a recognized guarantor, and proof that your first work contact is licensed
thaloris.risk: unverified parts, route volatility, and disputes over salvage quality
thaloris.market_opportunity: tested energy components and certified repair services
thaloris.dependency: lithium salt supplied through a volatile coastal route
thaloris.substitute: reconditioned energy cells and lower-capacity thermal systems
thaloris.community: classify donated repair stock for a neighborhood power-resilience workshop

solvend.sector: aerospace research, advanced instruments, and technical services
solvend.arrival: credential verification, temporary professional housing, and a booked skills assessment
solvend.risk: credential delays, specialist shortages, and concentrated cyber exposure
solvend.dependency: research crystal substrates supplied by a single certified producer
solvend.substitute: lower-spec optical assemblies and shared calibration capacity
solvend.community: prepare a public equipment-booking guide for a shared research laboratory

eldoran.sector: food distribution, wholesale markets, and secure commercial records
eldoran.arrival: affordable housing, reliable food-market access, and a verified local payment account
eldoran.risk: harvest variability, affordability pressure, and inventory-record errors
eldoran.market_opportunity: verified wholesale records and low-waste distribution
eldoran.dependency: conductive gold foil used in secure market terminals
eldoran.substitute: shared terminals and identity-laminate paper workflows
eldoran.community: map affordable food access and delivery gaps for a neighborhood distribution point

valerion.sector: water systems, environmental monitoring, and public infrastructure
valerion.arrival: a recognized address, deposit plan, and confirmed access to safe water services
valerion.risk: housing deposits, filter shortages, and aging water infrastructure
valerion.market_opportunity: water testing, filtration maintenance, and resilience services
valerion.dependency: filtration membranes supplied by one regional processor
valerion.substitute: ceramic filter media and emergency cartridge rotation
valerion.community: inspect a public refill station and produce a prioritized maintenance checklist

lumenor.sector: translation, education services, public information, and records support
lumenor.arrival: a recognized address, translated identity records, and access to public information channels
lumenor.risk: language barriers, document mismatch, and misinformation
lumenor.market_opportunity: verified translation and accessible public-information services
lumenor.dependency: educational display film sourced from a limited supplier
lumenor.substitute: archival polymer sheets and shared display terminals
lumenor.community: translate and simplify a settlement-services guide for newly arrived residents

xalvoria.sector: manufacturing, construction, warehousing, and industrial services
xalvoria.arrival: a bankable identity, recognized address, and verified employment or enterprise sponsor
xalvoria.risk: startup debt, project delays, and volatile material costs
xalvoria.dependency: machine steel billet delivered from a concentrated supplier
xalvoria.substitute: refined alloy ingot and staged low-volume fabrication
xalvoria.community: prepare a material and labor estimate for a small public repair project

dravenlok.sector: mining, foundry work, heavy maintenance, and structural repair
dravenlok.arrival: technical placement, worker-housing eligibility, and verified safety credentials
dravenlok.risk: equipment downtime, housing tied to employment, and heavy-material shortages
dravenlok.dependency: hardened steel plate supplied through an overcommitted foundry
dravenlok.substitute: refined alloy ingot and prioritized reinforcement kits
dravenlok.community: inspect a worker-housing utility area and document urgent repair priorities

syndalis.sector: secure communications, media verification, and digital services
syndalis.arrival: verified digital identity, temporary physical housing, and access to trusted emergency channels
syndalis.risk: identity fraud, disputed information, and network concentration
syndalis.dependency: encryption crystal matrix supplied through one trusted network
syndalis.substitute: approved encryption modules and lower-bandwidth verified channels
syndalis.community: verify a set of public emergency notices and record correction lineage
